resume.intro: Distributed Systems and Backend Engineer with 5+ years of experience, specialized in system design, high-concurrency architectures, and scalable cloud-native solutions. I build low-latency microservices, event-driven workflows, and robust REST APIs with strong focus on idempotency, observability, and code quality.

about.p1: I am Pedro Matos, a Fullstack Developer focused on backend and distributed systems. I design and operate scalable microservices, asynchronous architectures, and optimized data pipelines, ensuring high availability, fault tolerance, and full architectural ownership.
about.p2: I'm comfortable working across backend and frontend, integrating cloud services (AWS), discussing solutions, and leveraging AI-assisted tools as a force multiplier to accelerate delivery without compromising quality.
highlights: Distributed systems design, asynchronous architecture, and event-driven workflows.
REST APIs with strong focus on idempotency, versioning, and backward compatibility.
System observability (logging & tracing) and fintech / anti-fraud security.
I'm passionate about automation and electronics — if you have a project that combines both, feel free to reach out.

responsibilities: Design, build, and operate scalable cloud-native microservices for machine learning risk engines using FastAPI, Laravel, and AWS managed services, ensuring high availability and fault tolerance.
Extracted core engine logic into a dedicated asynchronous microservice, reducing evaluation response times by 78% (from 4.5s to under 1s) to efficiently handle high-volume concurrent traffic.
Integrated event-driven patterns and serverless workflows (AWS Lambda) to streamline asynchronous data processing, and implemented logging and monitoring for production-grade system observability.
Designed and implemented robust data models and scalable REST APIs for enterprise-level educational management, handling consistent user traffic across a Laravel/PostgreSQL stack.
Co-architected and launched 10+ high-impact system modules, focused on distributed reliability for students, school leaders, and administrative staff.
Drove improvements in product quality and usability, contributing to a 24% increase in the company's Net Promoter Score (NPS), raising it from 25 to 43 points.
Engineered core fintech and payment evaluation systems, integrating secure AWS services for fraud detection and implementing secure service-to-service authentication.
Developed business logic and features for precise personalized offer calculations using Laravel (PHP), MySQL, and a frontend built with Vanilla JavaScript and jQuery.
Architected a high-performance, large-scale data pipeline via a dedicated Python (Pandas) microservice, optimizing mass report processing of 1M+ rows by 86.6% (from 300s to 40s).
